abstract.title: Power-to-X in Germany
abstract.subtitle: Status Review & Analysis of the Implementation-Ambition Gap (2021-2024)

planned_capacity.label: Planned Capacity
planned_capacity.description: All PtX projects announced between 2021 and 2024

ambition_impl_gap.label: Ambition-Impl. Gap
ambition_impl_gap.description: Difference between planned and operational capacity
ambition_impl_gap.capacity_help: Significant gap between planned and operational capacity

key_finding.title: Key Finding
key_finding.highlight: By 2024, only 0.44 GW of the planned 3.38 GW capacity is operational.
key_finding.body: At the current trajectory, Germany will miss its 10 GW target by 2030 unless urgent action is taken to accelerate implementation.

geographic.title: Geographic Analysis
geographic.subtitle: Spatial Distribution of PtX Projects Across Germany (2021-2024)
geographic.description: Analysis at NUTS 1 (Federal States) and NUTS 3 (District) levels reveals strong regional concentration and significant disparities in project development.

distribution_section.title: Distribution of announced projects across Germany
